name: golang-github-juju-ratelimit-dev
title: golang-github-juju-ratelimit-dev
summary: Efficient token-bucket-based rate limiter module for Go
description:
Efficient token-bucket-based rate limiter module for Go
The ratelimit package provides an efficient token bucket
implementation in Go. The token bucket algorithm implements a
method for ensuring a reader or writer does not exceed a
specified rate limit.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-juju-ratelimit-dev because Efficient token-bucket-based rate limiter module for Go.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-juju-ratelimit-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-juju-ratelimit-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-juju-ratelimit-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
